resultList.dtldesc: Discover premium living in this beautifully designed 3 BHK penthouse-style apartment located in the well-developed residential locality of Zundal, Ahmedabad. Situated within the reputed Anand I Life project by Anand Group, this ready-to-move residence offers a perfect combination of comfort, space, and modern lifestyle amenities, making it an excellent choice for families seeking an upscale home in a rapidly growing neighbourhood. Positioned on the top floor of a 7-storey building, this furnished apartment spans a spacious carpet area of 2000 sq. ft and provides a thoughtfully planned layout with excellent ventilation and natural light. The residence features 3 well-sized bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and 1 balcony overlooking the society, creating a peaceful and refreshing living environment. The south-facing orientation and vastu-compliant design further enhance positivity and comfort within the home. The apartment comes fully furnished and is equipped with modern interiors that support immediate occupancy. The spacious combined living and dining area offers a welcoming ambience for family gatherings and entertaining guests. The modular kitchen is fitted with a chimney and includes piped gas connectivity for added convenience. Elegant vitrified flooring throughout the home enhances the overall appeal and functionality of the living spaces. Located in Anand I Life, the property benefits from a range of lifestyle amenities including a gymnasium, clubhouse, kids play area, power backup, security services, CCTV surveillance, reserved parking, and servicegoods lift facilities. The apartment also includes one covered parking space and enjoys an uninterrupted water supply and reliable electricity availability, ensuring a smooth and comfortable residential experience. Strategically located near the Tragad Underbridge and close to Vaishno Devi Circle, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to SG Highway and major parts of Ahmedabad. Important facilities such as hospitals, supermarkets, schools, banks, public transport, and daily conveniences are available within walking distance, making everyday living highly convenient for residents. The project is relatively new, with a construction age of less than 5 years, and consists of only 26 flats, ensuring a peaceful and less crowded residential environment. The top-floor positioning further adds exclusivity and privacy to the residence. Available at 1.58 Cr, this spacious furnished apartment in Anand I Life, Zundal, presents an outstanding opportunity for homebuyers looking for a premium ready-to-move property with modern amenities, excellent connectivity, and a comfortable lifestyle in Ahmedabad.

resultList.dtldesc: This expansive 5 BHK apartment in Motinagar, Ahmedabad, offers a rare opportunity for those seeking a grand residential space in a well-established urban setting. Designed for large families or those who appreciate generous living areas, the property combines traditional comfort with a strategic location, providing a tranquil home environment while remaining close to the citys vital amenities.Property SpecificationsThe residence spans a significant super area of 300 sq. yrd, with a carpet area of 265 sq. yrd. This north-facing unit is uniquely positioned on the ground floor of a four-storey building, featuring a three-side open margin that ensures exceptional natural light and ventilation. The semi-furnished interior includes five well-appointed bedrooms and five bathrooms, complemented by four private balconies that offer refreshing views of the garden and the main road. The layout is enhanced by two additional roomsa dedicated puja room and a storeroomproviding extra utility. The flooring is finished with elegant vitrified tiles, and the property carries a freehold ownership status approved by the Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation.FacilitiesResidents of this apartment benefit from a comprehensive range of facilities designed for a convenient lifestyle. The property includes separate covered parking for four-wheelers and two-wheelers, along with provisions for visitor parking. Essential utilities are well-managed with a 24-hour water supply and a reliable electrical system with minimal power cuts. Additional features such as an RO water system and access to a lift further enhance the living experience. Its ground-floor positioning offers excellent accessibility, making it an ideal choice for multi-generational families.LocalityLocated in the heart of Paldi within the Mahalaxmi Society, the apartment enjoys a prestigious address in Central Ahmedabad. The neighbourhood is known for its peaceful atmosphere and excellent connectivity to the rest of the city. The property is conveniently situated close to reputable hospitals, schools, and essential social infrastructure. The presence of a Jain Derasar temple nearby adds to the cultural and spiritual appeal of the locality. With well-laid roads and easy access to public transport, residents can enjoy a seamless commute to major commercial hubs and retail centres.

Public transport options including buses, autos, and cabs are also easily available.LocalityJagatpur is one of Ahmedabads rapidly growing residential localities known for its organised infrastructure and improving connectivity. The area offers easy access to educational institutions, healthcare centres, shopping facilities, and commercial establishments.Its proximity to Godrej Garden City and major connecting roads makes it suitable for families and working professionals seeking a well connected residential location. The locality continues to witness strong residential demand due to ongoing infrastructure development and modern housing projects.
